enonce.texte:
Match the words related to job availability with their correct definitions.

1. Vacancy
2. Application
3. Qualification
4. Demand
5. Salary
6. Experience
Definitions:
A. A formal request for a job
B. A job that is available
C. The money paid for work
D. The need or desire for a job
E. Knowledge or skill gained from doing something
F. A skill or degree needed for a job

questions.texte: Match each word with the correct definition by writing the correct letter (A-F) in your notebook.

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with words from the box: vacancy, application, qualification, demand, salary, experience

questions.texte: I saw a job ______ for a teacher in the newspaper.
questions.reponse: vacancy

questions.texte: You need to send your ______ to the company.
questions.reponse: application

questions.texte: A university degree is an important ______ for this job.
questions.reponse: qualification

questions.texte: There is a high ______ for nurses in Cameroon.
questions.reponse: demand

questions.texte: The ______ for this position is 200,000 CFA per month.
questions.reponse: salary

questions.texte: He has five years of ______ as a mechanic.
questions.reponse: experience

enonce.texte:
Read the job advertisement carefully and answer the questions.

📢 JOB VACANCY

Position: English Teacher

Location: Government Bilingual High School, Yaoundé

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's Degree in English or related field
  • At least 2 years of teaching experience
  • Good communication skills
  • Ability to work in a team

Salary: Competitive, based on experience

How to apply: Send your CV and application letter to the school principal before 30th June 2025.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

questions.texte: What is the position advertised in the notice?
questions.reponse: The position advertised is an English Teacher.

questions.texte: List three qualifications or requirements for this job.
questions.reponse: Three requirements are: a Bachelor's Degree in English or related field, at least 2 years of teaching experience, and good communication skills. (Any three correct answers).

questions.texte: What is the deadline for submitting applications?
questions.reponse: The deadline is 30th June 2025.

questions.texte: Explain what 'competitive salary based on experience' means.
questions.reponse: This means that the salary offered will be equal to what other similar jobs pay. The exact amount will depend on how much experience the person has. More experienced teachers may receive a higher salary.

questions.texte: Paraphrase the sentence: 'Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.'
questions.reponse: A possible paraphrase is: 'The school will only contact people who have been selected to continue in the hiring process.'

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences using the first conditional (if + present, future).

questions.texte: If you ______ (apply) for the job, you ______ (get) an interview.
questions.reponse: If you apply for the job, you will get an interview.

questions.texte: If she ______ (have) the right qualifications, she ______ (find) a good job.
questions.reponse: If she has the right qualifications, she will find a good job.

questions.texte: If they ______ (not / work) hard, they ______ (not / succeed).
questions.reponse: If they don't work hard, they will not succeed.

questions.texte: If we ______ (hire) more teachers, the school ______ (be) better.
questions.reponse: If we hire more teachers, the school will be better.

questions.texte: If you ______ (study) well, you ______ (pass) the exam.
questions.reponse: If you study well, you will pass the exam.

enonce.texte:
Read the report and answer the questions.

Job Market Report - Cameroon 2025

The job market in Cameroon is changing rapidly. Currently, there is a high demand for professionals in technology, healthcare, and education. Many companies are looking for IT specialists, nurses, and teachers. However, there are not enough qualified candidates to fill these positions.

In the technology sector, if you have coding skills, you will find many opportunities. Healthcare is also growing fast. If people study medicine or nursing, they will definitely find jobs. In education, the government is hiring more teachers for secondary schools.

On the other hand, there is low demand for some traditional jobs. If you only have basic skills, you will face more competition. The government advises young people to get training in high-demand fields.

questions.texte: Identify three sectors where there is high demand for jobs according to the report.
questions.reponse: Three sectors with high demand are: technology, healthcare, and education.

questions.texte: What advice does the government give to young people?
questions.reponse: The government advises young people to get training in high-demand fields.

questions.texte: According to the text, what will happen if someone studies medicine or nursing?
questions.reponse: If someone studies medicine or nursing, they will definitely find jobs.

questions.texte: What is the problem mentioned about qualified candidates?
questions.reponse: The problem is that there are not enough qualified candidates to fill the available positions in high-demand sectors.

questions.texte: In your opinion, why is there low demand for some traditional jobs?
questions.reponse: There is low demand for traditional jobs because technology is replacing many manual tasks. Also, the economy is changing, and new skills are needed. People with basic skills may face more competition.

intitule: Grammar: First Conditional - Complete the Sentences

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct form of the verb.

questions.texte: If you ______ (want) a good job, you ______ (need) good qualifications.
questions.reponse: If you want a good job, you will need good qualifications.

questions.texte: If they ______ (offer) me the job, I ______ (accept) it.
questions.reponse: If they offer me the job, I will accept it.

questions.texte: If there ______ (be) a vacancy, they ______ (advertise) it.
questions.reponse: If there is a vacancy, they will advertise it.

questions.texte: If you ______ (not / have) experience, you ______ (not / get) the job.
questions.reponse: If you don't have experience, you will not get the job.

questions.texte: If she ______ (train) hard, she ______ (become) a good doctor.
questions.reponse: If she trains hard, she will become a good doctor.

questions.texte: If we ______ (not / find) enough teachers, we ______ (have) a problem.
questions.reponse: If we don't find enough teachers, we will have a problem.

enonce.texte:
Write a short job application letter (about 100-120 words) for the position of English Teacher at Government Bilingual High School, Yaoundé.

Include the following information:

  • Why you are writing
  • Your qualifications
  • Your experience (or why you are suitable for the job)
  • Your contact information

questions.texte: Write a job application letter for the position of English Teacher.
questions.reponse:
Example answer:

Your Name
PO Box 1234
Yaoundé, Cameroon
Email: yourname@gmail.com
Phone: 691234567

20th June 2025

The Principal
Government Bilingual High School
Yaoundé, Cameroon

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to apply for the position of English Teacher that I saw advertised in your school notice. I have a Bachelor's Degree in English from the University of Yaoundé. I also have two years of teaching experience at a secondary school.

I am passionate about teaching and helping students learn. I work well in a team and have good communication skills. I am confident that I can contribute positively to your school.

I have attached my CV and application letter. Thank you for considering my application.

Yours faithfully,
Your Name

enonce.texte:
Read the job posting and answer the questions.

🏥 JOB OPPORTUNITY

Position: Registered Nurse

Location: Central Hospital, Douala

Requirements:

  • Nursing degree from an accredited institution
  • Valid nursing license
  • Minimum 3 years of experience
  • Excellent patient care skills
  • Knowledge of emergency procedures

Benefits: Competitive salary, health insurance, paid leave

Application deadline: 15th July 2025

How to apply: Submit your CV and cover letter to the Human Resources Department.

questions.texte: What position is available at Central Hospital, Douala?
questions.reponse: The position available is a Registered Nurse.

questions.texte: List four requirements for this position.
questions.reponse: Four requirements are: a nursing degree from an accredited institution, a valid nursing license, minimum 3 years of experience, excellent patient care skills, and knowledge of emergency procedures. (Any four correct answers).

questions.texte: What are the benefits offered for this job?
questions.reponse: The benefits are competitive salary, health insurance, and paid leave.

questions.texte: Analyse why the hospital requires 3 years of experience for this position.
questions.reponse: The hospital requires 3 years of experience because they want nurses who have practical knowledge and skills. Experienced nurses can handle emergencies better, provide quality patient care, and need less supervision. This ensures patient safety and good healthcare services.

questions.texte: Compare this nursing position with the teaching position from the previous advertisement. What similarities and differences do you notice?
questions.reponse:
Similarities: Both positions require qualifications (degree), experience, and good skills. Both offer competitive salaries and have application deadlines.

Differences: The nursing position requires a specific license and knowledge of emergency procedures. The teaching position focuses on communication and teamwork skills. The nursing job is at a hospital while the teaching job is at a school.

intitule: Grammar: First Conditional - Questions and Answers

enonce.texte: Complete the questions and answers using the first conditional.

questions.texte: If you ______ (study) medicine, what ______ you ______ (become)?
questions.reponse: If you study medicine, what will you become?

questions.texte: If she ______ (get) the job, she ______ (be) very happy.
questions.reponse: If she gets the job, she will be very happy.

questions.texte: ______ they ______ (hire) me if I ______ (have) good qualifications?
questions.reponse: Will they hire me if I have good qualifications?

questions.texte: If you ______ (not / study), you ______ (not / pass) the exam.
questions.reponse: If you don't study, you will not pass the exam.

questions.texte: Where ______ you ______ (work) if you ______ (become) a teacher?
questions.reponse: Where will you work if you become a teacher?

enonce.texte:
Write a short report (about 100-120 words) about the job market in your community. Use the first conditional at least twice.

Include information about:

  • What jobs are available
  • What qualifications are needed
  • What will happen if someone studies certain subjects

questions.texte: Write a report about the job market in your community.
questions.reponse:
Example answer:

In our community, there are many job opportunities for young people. The most available jobs are in teaching, nursing, and business. If you study to become a teacher, you will find a job easily. If you learn nursing, hospitals will hire you. However, if you only have a basic education, you will face more competition. Many businesses are looking for people with computer skills. If you learn to use computers well, you will have many options. The government is also creating jobs in agriculture. If people invest in modern farming, they will earn a good living. In conclusion, if we train well, we will find good jobs.

enonce.texte:
Complete the paragraph with words from the box: application, CV, vacancy, qualifications, experience, interview, salary

When you see a job (1) ______, you need to send an (2) ______ with your (3) ______. This document should list your (4) ______ and (5) ______. If the company likes your application, they will call you for an (6) ______. If you are successful, they will offer you a (7) ______.

questions.texte: Complete the paragraph with the correct words.
questions.reponse: 1. vacancy, 2. application, 3. CV, 4. qualifications, 5. experience, 6. interview, 7. salary

enonce.texte: Find and correct the mistakes in these first conditional sentences.

questions.texte: If you will apply for the job, you get an interview.
questions.reponse: If you apply for the job, you will get an interview.

questions.texte: If she have a degree, she will find a good job.
questions.reponse: If she has a degree, she will find a good job.

questions.texte: If they don't work hard, they will not succeed.
questions.reponse: This sentence is correct.

questions.texte: If you will study, you pass the exam.
questions.reponse: If you study, you will pass the exam.

questions.texte: If he gets the job, he will be very happy.
questions.reponse: This sentence is correct.
